Pros: Good story, good art, good music, good voices, generous item distribution
Cons: The gambling needs to be rebalanced. I should not be spending 50 cores and getting the same 3 cards and 1 awakener.
The devs actually care about their players, giving silver as an apology for disrupting gameplay wi

items.title: [正面] Its a very unique style of game, throws a hell of...
items.summary: Its a very unique style of game, throws a hell of a lot at the player to start with but your able to understand things well enough to enjoy it. Large variety of charecters and an interesting story thusfar. I recommend this if your a fan of card style games or have the unfortunate affinity for Darkes

items.title:
[负面] Its a gacha live service deck builder
I'd say its ...
items.summary:
Its a gacha live service deck builder
I'd say its easiest to think of this game as a mix of slay the spire and Genshin impact (it is not open world)
It is free, so if for whatever reason you can't afford slay the spire and you really like Genshin's lore dumping and gacha system then you would probably enjoy this game.

I personally felt the gameplay was too slow, combat was spaced out by 10 minutes of cutscenes and the cards were way too verbose and complicated sounding for what they actually did

And then there's the dialog and honestly I just want to play the game. Yeah you can skip it, but I wanted to get into the lore, I just couldn't. I don't recommend it, but its not the worst thing I've ever played either

5/10 game wouldn't play again, but its free so it doesn't hurt to try it

items.title: [正面] This game is phenomenal. It easily stands on equal...
items.summary: This game is phenomenal. It easily stands on equal ground with the legends like "Slay The Spire" and "Monster Train" in the gameplay and deck building department. Not only this, its deep narrative, visuals, music and characters paint a world both unnaturally dystopian yet fascinating. World building is parallel in quality to R1999, Limbus Company or Fate.
